login.title: Sign in
login.twoFactorHint: Two-factor authentication is enabled for your account. Please check your app and enter the one-time code shown there.
login.helpLinksLabel: If you can't sign in, use these links.

register.title: Registration
register.introHint: After registering, we'll send you a link to confirm your email address. You can only sign in once your email address has been confirmed.
register.passwordHint: As you type, we check whether your password is strong enough. Weak passwords are rejected.

forgot.title: Trouble signing in?
forgot.introHint: If you can't sign in, we can send you either your username or a link to reset your password. Choose password or username, and enter the email address on file. If you've forgotten your password, you also need to provide your username.
forgot.helpLinksLabel: If you can't sign in, use these links.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.introHint: Enter your new password. After saving, you can sign in with the new password.

resend.title: Resend confirmation link
resend.introHint: If your confirmation link has expired, you can request a new link to confirm your email address here. Please provide your username and email address.

profile.headline: Update profile
profile.intro: You can change your email address and/or your username. If you change your email address, you must confirm the new address — we'll send you a confirmation link.

password.headline: Change password
password.intro: You can change your password by entering your current password and the new password.

delete.headline: Delete account
delete.explanation: You can delete your account here if necessary. {warning} — this action deletes your account and all associated data.
delete.noSoftDeletes: We don't use a “deleted” flag — the account is removed immediately and permanently.
delete.reversed: This action cannot be undone — we cannot restore deleted accounts.

modal.intro: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account?

disabled.intro: Two-factor authentication uses {totp}. You need a compatible app, e.g. Google/Microsoft Authenticator or {bitwarden} / {enpass}.
disabled.confirm: Your password is required to enable it.

enabled.headline: Disable two-factor authentication
enabled.intro: Enter your password to disable two-factor authentication.

modal.introSetup: To finish setting up 2FA, scan the QR code in your authenticator app, or enter the setup code manually.
modal.introVerify: Enter the one-time password from your app and click “Confirm”.

recoveryCodes.headline: Recovery codes
recoveryCodes.intro: Recovery codes let you sign in when you no longer have access to your 2FA device. Store the recovery codes in a secure password manager.
recoveryCodes.usage: Each recovery code can be used only once to sign in to your account and is removed after use. If you need more recovery codes, use the “Regenerate” button.

errors.qrCode: The QR code could not be loaded.
errors.setupKey: The setup code could not be loaded.
errors.recoveryCodesLoad: The recovery codes could not be loaded.
errors.recoveryCodesRegenerate: The recovery codes could not be regenerated.
